# seerr_public_settings (Data Source)

Read Seerr public settings via /api/v1/settings/public.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "seerr_public_settings" "example" {}

output "seerr_is_initialized" {
  value = data.seerr_public_settings.example.initialized
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `app_title` (String) The application title.
- `application_url` (String) The application URL.
- `enable_local_login` (Boolean) Whether local login is enabled.
- `enable_plex_login` (Boolean) Whether Plex login is enabled.
- `initialized` (Boolean) Whether the Seerr instance is initialized.
- `movie_requests_enabled` (Boolean) Whether movie requests are enabled.
- `new_plex_login` (Boolean) Whether the new Plex login is enabled.
- `response_json` (String) Raw JSON response body.
- `series_requests_enabled` (Boolean) Whether series requests are enabled.
- `status_code` (Number) HTTP status code.
